image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about dual coding theory than social media does.
Context visual: Dual coding theory combines verbal and visual information to enhance understanding.
Escalation visual: Imagine learning a concept with both images and words—this makes it stick.
Evidence visual: Research shows we remember 65% of information paired with visuals.
Payoff visual: Use dual coding in your study routine to unlock better retention.
Cta visual: Curious to learn more about your brain? Follow for insights!
